prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 66 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 65–72 名区间；2026 年声誉评价中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 92 位（一般），短视频曝光量处于中低水平；无投档异常记录；应用经济学 A+、工商管理 A、统计学 A-，财经类学科实力突出；统计学 A- 与物理类招生专业（统计学类、经济统计学）直接关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，对物理类 考生吸引力强；金融/财经/经济类专业热度分化观望；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 110868 人，较 2025 年略降约 0.6%，按近年比例估算物理类考生约 79970 人，同比减少约 451 人，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 8467 名、2026 年计划扩招约 6.8% 使竞争缓解、考生总数略降形成叠加效应，以及计算机/电子信息类专业高热度吸引高分考生、财经类专业热度分化等因素，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年小幅后移；预测最低位次约 8833 名，区间 8333–9333 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 8333–9333 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如 8400 名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（会计学 CPA 方向、金融学类、统计学类）；位次接近区间上限（如 9200 名左右）应以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 3764→6136→17013→7771→8467. In 2023, it plummeted to 17013 due to a gap, then quickly rebounded, stabilizing in the 7700–8500 range in recent two years. The 2025 baseline is about 8467. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 39–40 students from 2021 to 2023, 41 in 2024, and increased to 44 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 47 students, an increase of about 6.8% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 66th (2026), stable in the 65–72 range in recent years. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking 92nd (average), short video exposure at a medium-low level. No abnormal filing records. Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines. Statistics A- is directly related to Physics Category enrollment majors (Statistics, Economic Statistics).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly popular and recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates. Finance/Economics majors have divided popularity and are under observation. The total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.6% compared to 2025. Estimated Physics Category candidates are about 79,970 based on recent proportions, a year-on-year decrease of about 451, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8467, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.8% easing competition, a slight decrease in total candidates creating a combined effect, and the high popularity of Computer/Electronic Information majors attracting high-scoring candidates while Finance/Economics majors have divided popularity, the 2026 minimum admission ranking is expected to slightly shift backward compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking is about 8833, with a range of 8333–9333.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8333–9333, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8400), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Accounting CPA direction, Finance Majors, Statistics Majors). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 9200), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1086→2056→1892→1261→1281. After a significant drop in 2022, it has gradually moved forward and stabilized in the past three years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1281. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 25–26 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 23 students in 2025; the 2026 plan is 20 students, a reduction of about 13% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 66th (2026), stable in the 65–72 range in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 92nd (average), short video exposure at a medium-low level; no abnormal application records; Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A, Statistics A-, strong financial and economic disciplines, attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for finance/finance/economics majors shows divergence and caution, overall application willingness tends to be rational; the province's total number of general college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is approximately 110,868, slightly down about 0.6% from 2025 (approximately 111,492). Based on recent proportions, history category candidates are estimated at about 30,898, a decrease of about 173 year-on-year, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1281, the 13% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, a slight decrease in total candidates offsetting, and stable university reputation with divergent major popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1166, with a range of 874–1458.
